title: Adabranium
description: This mod adds powerful fictional materials: Vibranium & Adamantium
body:
Adabranium is a mod made using Fabric API.

 The mod adds powerful Marvel materials: the vibranium from my "Nether Things" mod and the adamantium

 Adabranium 1.2.0+ remove all paxels in favor of my Adapaxels Mod. 

  • You can find vibranium ore and adamantium ore rarely below layer 8 in the overworld.
    • Theses two ores need a Netherite pickaxe (or an equal level) to mine and drop, adamantium ore takes much longer to mine.
    • Adamantium ore never spawn incontact with air (Same as ancient debris in the Nether).
  • Vibranium and adamantium must be processed to be used :

  • You can now create powerful swords, tools and armor !
    • Vibranium gear is crafted with a Netherite gear, a vibranium ingot, and an vibranium upgrade in a smithing table. Vibranium upgrade can be found in jungle and desert temples chests and can be duplicated using an amethyst block and 7 diamonds.
    • Adamantium gear is crafted with a vibranium gear, an adamantium ingot, and an adamantium upgrade in a smithing table. Adamantium upgrade can be found in ancient cities chests and can be duplicated using Sculk and 7 diamonds.

       

  • Vibranium sets are better than Netherite, mine faster and the sword inflict 10 attack damage. The
    durability for tools and sword is 2701.
  • Adamantium Sets is the best equipment, mine faster than vibranium and the sword inflict 12 attack damage. The durability for tools and sword is 3346.
  • You can melt vibranium in a furnace or blast furnace to make vibranium dust.
  • You can find Heart Shaped Plant in jungles to obtain Heart Shaped Herb.
    • Heart Shaped Herb can be used to make a Toughness Potion (Resistance I).
    • You can make a vibranium soup with some Heart Shaped Herbs and a vibranium dust.
      • Vibranium Soup gives Strength II (1:00), Resistance II (1:30) and Speed II (2:30)

 

  • You can also make Nether tools, sword and armor
    • Nether set is an iron set upgrade that can't burn and floats on lava
    • Can be made with an iron gear with two Nether bricks (one as template) in a smithing table
    • Does exactly the same damage and protects like iron but has a little greater durability and mine as fast as diamond.
  • The Oneshotium Sword is obviously unobtainable in survival

 

 

Vibranium differences with Nether Things :

     - Don't generate in the Nether

     - Is a little more rare

     - Is a little bit nerfed (2701 of durability instead of 23000 for example)

     - Require Vibranium Ingot instead of Vibranium

     - Vibranium Dust made with Vibranium

     - Toughness Potion give Resistance I instead of II and the duration has been changed

     - Removed Compressed Vibranium Block and Invincibility Potion

     - Improved all textures
